summary: Explosion API migration, FirePower rename, Metalworking->Blacksmithing

changes.description: drawCircleExplosion moved from IsoGridSquare to IsoTraps
changes.context: Explosion functions migrated to IsoTraps/IsoGenerator in 42.12

changes.description: FirePower script property renamed to FireStartingEnergy — fire-starting capability on items/weapons will be silently ignored
changes.context: Script property renamed in 42.12; the weapon/item still works but its fire-starting effect does nothing until updated

changes.description: Metalworking renamed to Blacksmithing in player-facing text
ISVehicleMechanics UI changed — vehicle mechanics context menu option removed
changes.replacement: Check B42 vehicle UI API for updated approach
changes.context: Vehicle mechanics RMC option removed in 42.12, UI overhauled
